summary: Validated the dual-POV chapter scaffold plus 7 beats. 3 warnings: beats 4-6 need differentiated descent, the late scene-beat outcome palette skews negative, and the Scene 1 -> Scene 2 POV handoff must stay absolute. 2 enrichments from Capital City/Frostmourne and Mal'Ganis research. Continuity and chapter-bridge annotation deferred to plan-verifier.
